issue.title: www.gsmarena.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:

issue.title: browser.yandex.ru

labels.name: Stale
labels.description: The issue was not processed on time and was bumped to the top of the list

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://browser.yandex.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbrowser.yandex.ru%2F) ### Comment > com.yandex.browser.beta > Яндекс тестирует ленту с рекламой в новой вкладке.
